findings.description: North Carolina state flag image is missing from the HTML rendering on page 1
findings.evidence: PDF shows the NC state flag prominently centered at the top of the title slide. HTML shows only the title text and subtitle without the flag image.

findings.description: North Carolina state flag image is missing from the HTML rendering on page 2
findings.evidence: PDF shows the NC state flag on a dark/blank slide. HTML shows only a small flag image but the page appears mostly blank in both versions.

findings.description: Nested concentric ellipses diagram missing from HTML on page 10
findings.evidence: PDF shows a diagram with two nested ellipses - outer labeled 'Water Supply Planning' and inner labeled 'River Basin Modeling'. HTML renders these as plain text labels without any visual diagram.

findings.description: DWR logo/graphic is significantly smaller in HTML compared to PDF on page 11
findings.evidence: PDF shows a large DWR (Division of Water Resources) logo prominently displayed. HTML shows the same logo but at a much smaller size.

findings.description: Multiple h2 headings use the same text 'SAB – What It Is', which accurately reflects the PDF slides but could cause confusion. The PDF uses three separate slides with the same title.
findings.evidence: Pages 6, 7, and 8 of the PDF all have the title 'SAB – What It Is'. The HTML reproduces this with three separate h2 headings with the same text.

findings.description: The HTML contains a nested <main> element inside another <main> element, which is a structural duplication of the wrapper element, though it does not result in duplicated content.
